category_sources: source_facts.description says it replaces port numbers with stable named local URLs; official docs describe local development URLs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is portless; official documentation and repository use portless.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe stable .localhost URLs, proxying, HTTPS, and CLI use.
